name: orch_check_new_fanout
description: 'Check for new' with no source named: fans out to all three source agents, aggregates MONEYMAKERS, and relays the subagent's question to the user.

tool_responses.doc_agent:
MONEYMAKERS:
- Wells Fargo $2,500 Premier Checking Bonus | ~$2500 | https://www.doctorofcredit.com/wells-fargo-2500-premier-checking-bonus/ | large bonus, achievable requirements
tool_responses.swagbucks_agent:
MONEYMAKERS:
- Chime signup + direct deposit | 15000 SB | ~$150 | quick signup, no spend required
QUESTIONS:
- Do you already have a Chime account?
